content_body: We spent Memorial Day weekend here and it was a memorable and relaxing one. The property is in great shape, and there is a breathtaking view from the back deck/balcony. Kid friendly too with a rec area in the basement - ping pong table and a pool table. There a pathway down to the river if you’re up for a short hike. Spacious mountain house for a large family. A great place to unplug and unwind!
title: Memorable and Relaxing
